description: Brazilian Portuguese language pack for adult real-world learning. Meets the §10.1 MVP Seed Pack Target in full: 300 vocabulary, 75 core phrases, 25 grammar points, 25 dialogues, 20 slang/register items, 20 pronunciation drills, 10 listening exercises, 10 writing prompts, 10 assessments, 5 roleplay scenarios.
coverage: A1-A2 everyday + adult real-world speech: courtesy through profanity (severity 1-7, with recognize-only/avoid guidance), formal/informal register contrast (você/tu/o senhor, a gente), spoken-Brazilian reality (contractions, ir+infinitive future, pronoun fronting), SP vs RJ regional variation, and pronunciation features with no clean English analog (nasal vowels, r/rr, de/ti palatalization, open/closed e-o metaphony).
editorialNotes: Identity-based slurs (racial, homophobic, ableist) were deliberately EXCLUDED from the profanity set pending explicit owner review of framing before any inclusion, even as recognize-only. See NATIVE_REVIEW.md for the full list of items flagged by the authoring agents for a native speaker's sign-off.
